vision_analysis.primary_subject: double-pane window with visible fogging between panes
vision_analysis.context_notes: Living room window, large fixed pane.

input.transcript: Living room window has a failed seal — fogging between the panes. Functional but the IGU is shot. Buyer should know.

expected.rationale: SoP explicitly: windows with fogged appearance or broken seal evidence. Common, fixable, not urgent.

vision_analysis.primary_subject: interior stair handrail with loose attachment

visible_defects.defect: Handrail moves laterally when pushed; bracket pulled partially from wall

input.transcript: Basement stair handrail is loose, bracket is pulling out of the wall. With a 12-step run this is a real fall hazard. Need to secure into studs.

expected.rationale: Loose handrail at full stair run is a fall hazard. SoP lists railings/guards/handrails specifically.

source: InterNACHI SoP §3.10 — garage photo-eye safety reverse

visible_defects.defect: Garage door did not reverse when photo-eye beam was blocked during closing

input.transcript: Garage door — tested the photo-eye by blocking the beam during closing. Door didn't reverse. Photo-eye is either misaligned or failed. Safety issue.

expected.rationale: SoP §3.10 explicitly: photo-electric safety sensors not operating properly. This is the entrapment-risk failure mode.
